历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were 9672 → 12886 → 13079 → 8727 → 11509, showing significant fluctuations in the past five years; the 2024 ranking of 8727 was abnormally advanced (possibly due to the first year of the new college entrance exam or a gap), and in 2025 it rebounded to 11509, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2837 positions over the past three years; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jilin Province was 37 students in 2024, 37 in 2025, and remains 37 in 2026, unchanged for three consecutive years, with no impact from expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Ranked 84th in Douyin popularity, with an average evaluation; no obvious gaps in admission records; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Anhui...

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, Artificial Intelligence is cautiously observed, and Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials are clearly discouraged; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Jilin Province general college entrance exam is about 110,868, with an estimated Physics Category of about 80,047 based on recent proportions, roughly the same as the 80,421 in 2025; Anhui University is located in Hefei, Anhui Province, not a local university in Jilin Province, so cross-provincial enrollment has no significant regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the enrollment plan being unchanged for three consecutive years, the total number of candidates being basically stable, the university's ranking slightly declining but its level being solid, average reputation and popularity, and the 2025 ranking rebounding from the low point in 2024, based on the 2025 benchmark of 11,509, the ranking is expected to shift slightly backward (competition slightly weakens), with a predicted minimum ranking of about 11,559, and a range of 11,059–12,059.
